articles.author: Patrick Finley, Fran Spielman
articles.title: It's Indiana: Bears' board of directors votes to push stadium to Hammond - Chicago Sun-Times
articles.description: A source cautioned that Friday's announcement didn't eliminate Arlington Heights from consideration, were the state to find a way to give the Bears property tax certainty on the 326-acre plot they own.
articles.content: The Bears board of directors met Thursday and decided to move forward with their plans to build a stadium in Indiana, positioning the team to play its home games out of state for the first time in it… [+9114 chars]
